Instant：专为 AI 编码应用设计的后端

Instant: The Best Backend for AI-Coded Apps

2026-04-10

Instant 是一个专为 AI 编码应用设计的后端服务。它为 AI 智能体提供了一个真正的后端，包含身份验证、权限管理、存储、实时在线状态和流处理——构建用户喜爱应用所需的一切。

为 AI 而生

Instant 提供了一个可通过 CLI 操作的后端。你的智能体可以完成人类在仪表板上能做的所有事情，而且当出现问题时，内置了撤销功能。

无需离开终端

从终端创建账户、启动数据库、推送 schema、构建应用。没有仪表板，无需点击 UI。只有你、你的智能体和代码。

对人类简单，对 LLM 完美

Instant 拥有极小的 API 接口。现代 LLM 已经从训练数据中了解它。而且高级功能仅占上下文的 1%。

端到端类型安全

Instant 为你的 schema、权限、查询和事务提供类型支持。这使得早期捕获错误变得容易，你的 AI 可以理解数据模型并在第一次尝试时生成正确的代码。

撤销破坏性变更

LLM 可能会犯错。对于 schema 删除等破坏性操作，Instant 内置了撤销功能。

访问官网：https://www.instantdb.com

Instant is a backend service designed specifically for AI-coded apps. It provides a real backend for AI agents, including auth, permissions, storage, presence, and streams — everything you need to ship apps your users will love.

Built for AI

Instant provides a backend designed to be operated from the CLI. Your agent can do everything a human can do with a dashboard, and when things go wrong, undo is built in.

Never Leave Your Terminal

Create an account, spin up a database, push schema, and build from the terminal. No dashboards. No clicking through UIs. Just you, your agent, and your code.

Easy for Humans, Perfect for LLMs

Instant has a tiny API surface. Modern LLMs already know it from their training data. And it takes only 1% of context for advanced features.

End-to-End Type Safety

Instant comes with types for your schema, permissions, queries, and transactions. This makes it easy to catch errors early. Your AI can understand your data model and generate correct code on the first try.

Undo Destructive Changes

LLMs can make mistakes. For destructive actions like schema deletions, Instant comes with built-in undo.

Visit: https://www.instantdb.com
